mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_DOWNLOAD_REQ ( USER_CD, USER_NM, REQ_DIV, REQ_NM, REQ_NUM, REQ_REASON, PROGRAM_ID, PROGRAM_NM, REG_DATE, PROGRAM_WHERE, BULK_YN ) VALUES ( #{userCd}, #{userNm}, #{reqDiv}, #{reqNm}, #{reqNum}, #{reqReason}, #{programId}, (SELECT MENU_NM FROM mhdb.TB_MENU WHERE MENU_URL ILIKE concat('%', #{programId}, '%') LIMIT 1), #{regDate}, #{programWhere}, 'N' )
